creator: mfisher911@gmail.com

diff -u /usr/ports/lang/python37/Makefile.version python37/Makefile.version
--- /usr/ports/lang/python37/Makefile.version	2021-07-06 10:59:30.000000000 -0400
+++ python37/Makefile.version	2021-09-15 11:11:28.000000000 -0400
@@ -2,4 +2,4 @@
 
 # Do not forget to update python documentation (lang/python-doc-*)
 # Run "make -C lang/python-doc-html makesum"
-PYTHON_DISTVERSION=	3.7.11
+PYTHON_DISTVERSION=	3.7.12
